description: This figure displays a chart of calculated two-dimensional mismatch degrees for composite inclusion interfaces in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C low-density steels. The plot contains four data points corresponding to the interfaces Al2O3/MnS, AlN/MnS, TiN/MnS, and Al2O3/AlN, with the vertical axis showing mismatch values in percent. The chart is horizontally divided into three zones: Most effective zone below 6%, Moderate effective zone between 6% and 12%, and Invalid zone above 12%. Visually, all four points lie within the Moderate effective zone, with Al2O3/MnS and AlN/MnS positioned at lower mismatch values while TiN/MnS and Al2O3/AlN are located near the upper boundary. The caption and citation sentences report the specific values as 8.41%, 8.94%, 11.65%, and 11.66%, respectively. These results indicate that Al2O3, AlN, and TiN can serve as heterogeneous nucleation substrates for MnS, and Al2O3 can also provide nucleation sites for AlN, supporting the formation mechanism of composite inclusions observed in the steel samples.
